title: selaginella agioneuma
intro: Selaginella agioneuma, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of small, non-vascular, spore-bearing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. The medicinal properties of Selaginella agioneuma lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Selaginella agioneuma is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to utilize its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world.
